summary: Tested 4 new features: Featured Venue Cards, Customer Testimonials, VenueDetail dark booking card, and Favorites/Wishlist. Backend 13/13 tests pass. Landing page all 11 sections verified. Critical issue: VenuePublicPage.js (the page featured venue cards link to) was NOT updated with dark card or new gold color - only VenueDetailPage.js was updated.

minor.issue: Customer credentials 'democustomer@venulock.in / password123' return 'Invalid credentials'. Token field is 'token' not 'access_token' (minor API contract note).

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Featured venue cards link to /venues/:citySlug/:venueSlug which renders VenuePublicPage, NOT VenueDetailPage. VenuePublicPage still has: (1) WHITE booking card bg-white instead of dark #111111, (2) OLD gold #C8A960 instead of new #D4AF37 (27 elements), (3) CTA says 'Speak to Venue Expert' not 'Speak to Our Venue Expert', (4) CTA links to /#concierge instead of opening an enquiry modal.

issues: Still uses old gold #C8A960 (rgb 200,169,96) throughout - 27 elements
Booking card is white/light instead of dark #111111
CTA button does not open enquiry form modal - links to /#concierge anchor

action_items: Update VenuePublicPage.js: Change booking card bg from 'bg-white border border-slate-200' to 'bg-[#111111]' (dark card) - matching VenueDetailPage design
Update VenuePublicPage.js: Change all #C8A960 gold references to #D4AF37 (new gold) - check star ratings, buttons, borders
Update VenuePublicPage.js: Change CTA button text from 'Speak to Venue Expert' to 'Speak to Our Venue Expert'
Update VenuePublicPage.js: Change CTA button from Link to /#concierge to button that opens enquiry form/modal (like VenueDetailPage)
Fix/create customer test account 'democustomer@venulock.in / password123' or update provided credentials
critical_code_review_comments: VenuePublicPage.js (line 100) uses old gold in 'not found' state: `className="text-[#C8A960] mt-2 inline-block"`
VenuePublicPage.js (lines 199, 201): Old gold #C8A960 for thumbnail border and rating star fill
VenuePublicPage.js (line 311): Reviews star fill uses `fill-[#C8A960] text-[#C8A960]`
VenuePublicPage.js (line 354-369): CTA card is bg-white with old gold CTA button (#C8A960) that links to /#concierge
FeaturedVenueCard (LandingPage.js line 48): Correctly uses city_slug+slug URLs for navigation, which go to VenuePublicPage NOT VenueDetailPage

success_rate.frontend: 80% (VenuePublicPage not updated, all other features pass)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Previous iterations all passed for landing page sections. New features tested: (1) Featured Venues - 4 cards loading from /api/venues/featured, working ✓ (2) Testimonials - 3 static cards (Priya Sharma/Wedding/Delhi, Rohan Mehta/Corp/Mumbai, Ananya Patel/Bday/Bengaluru), working ✓ (3) VenueDetailPage dark card - WORKING at /venues/venue_ID format, dark #111111 card with #D4AF37 gold CTA and enquiry modal ✓ (4) VenuePublicPage (SEO slug URL) - NOT updated, still uses old white card + #C8A960 gold - this is the page featured venue cards link to (5) Favorites/Wishlist - toggle works on search page (heart turns red on save), redirects to login when unauthenticated ✓. Admin token key is 'token' not 'access_token'.

rca_of_issue.issue: VenueDetailPage.js dark card changes NOT reflected in VenuePublicPage.js
rca_of_issue.root_cause: App has two venue detail page components: (1) VenueDetailPage.js - accessed via /venues/venue_XXXXX (direct ID format) - WAS updated with dark #111111 card, #D4AF37 gold, 'Speak to Our Venue Expert' CTA, enquiry modal. (2) VenuePublicPage.js - accessed via /venues/:citySlug/:venueSlug (SEO slug format) - was NOT updated, still uses old white card and #C8A960. Featured venue cards on landing page use FeaturedVenueCard which constructs URL as `/venues/${venue.city_slug}/${venue.slug}` (slug format), therefore routing to VenuePublicPage, not VenueDetailPage.
reproduction_steps: 4. Page is VenuePublicPage - see white booking card with old gold button
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Apply the same dark card styling changes from VenueDetailPage.js to VenuePublicPage.js. Specifically update lines 354-410 (CTA card, booking area, icons) and all #C8A960 references.
